hooks.command: echo '=== wiki-graph context ===' && ([ -f wiki/hot.md ] && echo '--- Hot Cache (recent wiki activity) ---' && cat wiki/hot.md || echo '[hot cache empty]') && ([ -f 'brain/North Star.md' ] && echo '--- North Star ---' && cat 'brain/North Star.md' || true) && ([ -f work/Index.md ] && echo '--- Active Work ---' && head -60 work/Index.md || true)

hooks.prompt: Context loaded above: wiki/hot.md (recent wiki activity), brain/North Star.md (current goals), work/Index.md (active tasks). Absorb this context silently. Do not announce what you read. Do not summarize. Just have the context available.
Context does not survive compaction. Silently re-read wiki/hot.md, brain/North Star.md, and the active section of work/Index.md to restore session context. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: [ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ work/ brain/ .raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki-graph: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

[ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(wiki|work|brain)/' && echo 'SESSION_WRAP: Knowledge base changed this session. Please: (1) Update wiki/hot.md — brief summary of what changed, under 500 words, format: Last Updated / Key Recent Facts / Recent Changes / Active Threads. (2) Update brain/Key Decisions.md if any team decisions were recorded. (3) Update work/Index.md if any task status changed.' || true
